name: BMW F10 5 Series plug-in hybrid (3.0L 6-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: ActiveHybrid 5 PHEV: CBS petrol engine oil MFR 30,000 km / 12 months EU (hybrid low engine use; SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years; garage.wiki F10/F18 lists first change at 3 years for many variants.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Petrol engine air filter each second oil service (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling) per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: six plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F10/F18).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Regen extends pad life; inspect per CBS.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: Includes hybrid-specific checks; use HV-qualified workshops.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: HV battery/e-drive cooling circuit; 120,000 km MFR per BMW ActiveHybrid 5 maintenance / HV supplement.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection petrol unit: ~120,000 km if combustion mileage is high.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals); BMW ActiveHybrid 5 owner's manual — 30,000 km / 12 months petrol engine oil typical
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — brake fluid table; BMW owner's manual ActiveHybrid 5
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval (F10 hybrid CBS in data)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW ActiveHybrid 5 service information / HV supplement — battery coolant 120,000 km (EU maintenance table)
